channel.title: docs
channel.description: Documentation for using the Markata static site generator

item.title: Changelog
item.description: Markata Changelog 0.9.1 HUGE DOCS UPDATE FIX: feeds now update with any content change FIX: og tags should use property not name 0.9.0 Feat: add skip plugin Fix
item.author: Waylon Walker

item.author: Waylon Walker

item.author: Waylon Walker

item.author: Waylon Walker

item.description: The `markata.plugins.redirects` plugin creates static redirects for your site using a simple configuration file. Compatible with services like Cloudflare Pages
item.author: Waylon Walker

item.author: Waylon Walker

item.author: Waylon Walker

item.author: Waylon Walker

item.description: The `markata.plugins.heading_link` plugin adds clickable link icons next to headings in your HTML output. This makes it easy for readers to share direct links t
item.author: Waylon Walker

item.author: Waylon Walker

item.description: The `markata.plugins.mdit_details` plugin adds support for collapsible details/summary sections in markdown using the `???` syntax. This is similar to HTML&#x27
item.author: Waylon Walker

item.author: Waylon Walker

item.author: Waylon Walker

item.title: md_it_wikilinks.py
item.description: The `markata.plugins.md_it_wikilinks` plugin adds support for wiki-style links using double brackets (`[[link]]`). It automatically resolves links to other post
item.author: Waylon Walker

item.description: The `markata.plugins.render_markdown` plugin converts markdown content to HTML. This plugin is essential for rendering markdown files loaded by the `load` plugi
item.author: Waylon Walker

item.title: auto_description.py
item.description: The `markata.plugins.auto_description` plugin automatically generates descriptions for your posts by extracting text from the first paragraphs of your markdown
item.author: Waylon Walker
